title: aneilema gramineum var. typicum
intro: Aneilema gramineum var. typicum, also known as the grassy aneilema or grassy leaf aneilema, is a plant species in the family Commelinaceae. It is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Aneilema gramineum var. typicum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, allowing for the extraction of its beneficial compounds.
